release_notes: Test-build for live animation tuning. Three changes: (a) Stretches, Jumping jacks, Lifts weights, Little dance, and Cartwheels are now the default-enabled animations; Surprise, Juggling, Power nap, and Yoga default off (still visible and pickable in the picker — the user can opt them in later). New DEFAULT_ENABLED dict in ready_animations is the single source of truth shared by the picker's checkbox state and the trigger's pick-random-enabled function. (b) Wave gesture slowed from 3 cycles per gesture to 2, so the hand sweeps back and forth twice instead of three times in the same time window — reads as a friendlier 'bye-bye' instead of a frantic flutter. (c) AnimationTrigger gains a TEST_MODE class attribute (default True for this build) that makes on_ready_sent() return True every time — every outgoing Ready click fires a random animation. Flip TEST_MODE to False before publishing a build for end users; the spacing-and-count logic stays in place and resumes once the flag is off.
